## Security Summary

| OWASP | Finding | Severity | Pre-existing? |
|---|---|---|---|
| A07 | Auth header format non-standard | High | Yes |
| A02 | Token in localStorage | Medium | Yes |
| A04 | Cart quantity — no server-side bounds | Medium | Yes |
| A05 | MongoDB no-auth (local dev) | Medium | Yes |
| A09 | Cart errors silently swallowed | Medium | Yes |

**Bug fix security impact**: Security-neutral — no new attack surface introduced.
